common.commandSearchDescription: Search for a command to run.
common.discardChangesDescription: You have unsaved changes that will be lost.
common.noResultsDescription: Try adjusting your search or filter.

auth.wrongHost: This account belongs to a different site. Sign in from your site's admin URL (e.g. admin.yoursite.com).
auth.superAdminOnSiteHost: Super-admin accounts must sign in from the workspace host, not a site subdomain.
auth.crossSite: This account is not a member of this site. Sign in from your own site's admin URL.
auth.noUser: We couldn't find an account matching that session. Please sign in again.
auth.forbidden: You don't have permission to access that page. Sign in with an account that does.
auth.socialUnlinked: That provider account is not linked to an invited CMS user.
auth.socialSession: The provider login could not create a CMS session.
auth.magicLinkSession: The email sign-in link could not create a CMS session.
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your email for a sign-in link.
auth.tooManyRequests: Too many requests - please wait a minute and try again
auth.resetSent: If that email exists, a reset link has been sent.
auth.checkInbox: Check your inbox for a reset link.
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to manage your sites

dashboard.forbidden: You don't have permission to access that page. You've been redirected to your dashboard.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: A focused view of consented website traffic, actions, and conversions.
analytics.superAdminDescription: Select a site first to view analytics.
analytics.unavailableDescription: PostHog query settings are missing or disabled. Tracking can still be projected for sites once configuration is present.
analytics.label: Label
analytics.measuredFromVisitors: {samples} measurements from about {visitors} visitors after analytics consent.
analytics.lowSampleNotice: This score is based on a small number of measurements and can move quickly.
analytics.fieldPerformanceExplanation: Real visitor loading, interaction, and stability signals.
analytics.siteQualityExplanation: CMS checks for metadata, navigation, contact details, and publishing basics.

adminAnalytics.title: SIAB analytics
adminAnalytics.description: Internal analytics and intelligence across all client sites, with optional site filtering.

sites.title: Sites
sites.noneDescription: Create your first site to get started.

pages.title: Pages
pages.noneDescription: Create your first page to start building this site.

forms.title: Forms
forms.noneDescription: When your forms receive submissions, they appear here.

team.title: Team
team.noneDescription: Invite your first team member to collaborate on this site.

users.title: All users
users.noneDescription: Provision a user account to grant access.

sites.deleteDescription: About to delete site {name} ({domain}). This cascade-deletes {pages} {pages, plural, one {page} other {pages}}, {media} {media, plural, one {media file} other {media files}}, {forms} {forms, plural, one {submission} other {submissions}}, and removes the site's on-disk directory. Irreversible.
sites.deleteDescriptionLoading: About to delete site {name} ({domain}). This cascade-deletes the site's pages, media, submissions, settings, and on-disk directory. Loading counts... Irreversible.
sites.newDescription: Create a new client site. You'll continue to onboarding once it's created.
sites.name: Name
sites.slugDescription: Used in admin URLs such as /sites/site-slug.
sites.domainDescription: Bare apex without the admin. prefix.
sites.archiveDescription: Archiving moves the on-disk directory to archived/.
sites.manifestDescription: JSON configuration for the editor. Leave empty when there is no configuration.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.slug: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only
validation.domain: Enter a domain (at least 3 characters, e.g. clientasite.nl)
validation.manifest: Does not match the manifest schema

pages.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete the page {title} and remove it from the live site. Cannot be undone.

media.deleteBrokenWarning: Pages referencing this file will show a broken image until you replace or remove it.
media.deleteBulkTitle: Delete {count} {count, plural, one {media item} other {media items}}
media.deleteBulkReferencedWarning: Some of these files are referenced by pages. Those pages will show broken images until the references are replaced.
media.noneDescription: Upload images, video, or PDFs using the Upload button at the top of the page.

users.createDescription: Create a user account and assign access.
users.createdKeyDescription: User is created. Copy the API key below now - it won't be shown again after this dialog closes.
users.apiKeySetFailed: User was created, but setting the API key failed: {message}
users.emailLockedDescription: Email is the canonical identifier and cannot be changed via this form. To change a user's email, delete this account and create a new one.
users.inviteDescription: Check the address carefully. The invite link gives that mailbox access to this site.
users.siteRequired: Site is required for non-super-admin roles
users.roleDescription: Super-admins manage all sites and have no site assignment. Other roles must be assigned to exactly one site.
users.deleteDescription: Removing {email} permanently deletes the account and revokes access. The user's site membership is removed; sites and their content stay.
users.deleteDescriptionReinvite: The user can be re-invited later, but with a fresh history.
users.deleteConfirmDescription: About to delete {email}. This is irreversible.
users.apiKeyOnce: A unique key will be generated and shown once after save.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.noneDescription: Add a page, section, or custom link to build this menu.
navigation.removeEntryDescription: Remove {label} from the {zone} navigation? It is removed from the list immediately; nothing is persisted until you click Save.
navigation.sectionHint: Jump to a #section within a page.
navigation.customHint: Any URL - internal path or external site.
navigation.noAnchorsDescription: This page has no anchored sections yet. Sections come from block anchor ids - set them on the page's blocks in the page editor.
navigation.label: Label

onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.subtitle: Manual steps to bring admin.{domain} live.
onboarding.certificateDescription: Traefik issues the certificate after DNS points at the VPS
onboarding.createOwner: Create owner user and send invite

emailPreferences.personalDescription: Choose which optional email you receive. These choices belong to you and cannot be enabled by a site owner.
emailPreferences.marketingDescription: Tips, updates and offers from Site in a Box. Off unless you explicitly opt in.
emailPreferences.productNotificationsDescription: Optional non-promotional updates about product features and workflows.
emailPreferences.mandatoryDescription: Security, requested transactional and required legal messages cannot be disabled here.
emailPreferences.tenantDescription: Choose which team members receive operational messages. This does not change anyone's marketing consent.
emailPreferences.failedDescription: The email preferences could not be updated. Please try again.
emailPreferences.criticalDescription: Keep at least one recipient enabled for every critical operational category.

settings.contactEmailDescription: Public contact address shown on the website. Operational form notifications are configured under Email preferences.
settings.dataExportDescription: Email a copy of your account data and site-access summary to your address.
settings.dataExportRequested: Data export requested. Check your email.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you tried to open doesn't exist or has been removed. Check the URL or use the sidebar to navigate.

apiKey.title: API key
apiKey.copyNow: Copy now - the admin API will not return this key again. Store it in a password manager or secrets vault.
apiKey.description: API keys let machine clients authenticate as you. Keys are encrypted at rest and the admin API refuses to return them on read - copy each new key the moment it's generated, since you can't retrieve it later.
apiKey.activeDescription: An API key is active for this account.
apiKey.inactiveDescription: No active API key. Generate one to enable machine access.
apiKey.rotateDescription: Rotating immediately invalidates the previous key. Update any external integrations afterward. You may need to sign in again after rotating - the new key is shown one-time before that happens.
apiKey.enableDescription: Enabling generates a key that's shown once on the next screen - copy it before continuing. You may need to sign in again afterward.
apiKey.disableDescription: This stops the key from authenticating new requests. Any integrations currently using it will start receiving 401 errors immediately. You can issue a new key afterward.
apiKey.superAdminOnlyDescription: API keys are issued and rotated by your super-admin. If you need a key for machine access - or need an existing one rotated - contact your super-admin to request the change.
apiKey.restriction: This restriction prevents persistent header-based credentials from being established or rotated outside the super-admin path.

editor.editorFrameTimeout: The editor frame did not finish loading. Retry the frame.
editor.editorFrameLoadFailedDescription: The editor frame failed to load.
editor.editorFrameNotReady: The iframe did not report readiness.
editor.editorFrameWaiting: Waiting for the renderer to become ready.
editor.noStylesForSelection: No styles available for this selection.
editor.draftRestoreFailed: Recovered draft could not be restored
editor.restoreDraftWithDate: A local draft from {date} was recovered after the page reloaded.
editor.restoreDraft: A local draft was recovered after the page reloaded.
editor.deletePageDescription: This will permanently delete the page {title} and remove it from the live site. Cannot be undone.
editor.deleteUnsavedDescription: Once saved, you can permanently delete this page from here.
editor.deleteSavedDescription: Deleting page {title} removes the page and any block content. Cannot be undone.
editor.savePageFirst: Save the page first to enable delete.
editor.navigationDescription: Show this page in Header or Footer. Reorder entries on the Navigation page.
editor.editorModePreferenceFailed: Failed to save editor mode preference
editor.logoOverrideDescription: Leave empty to use the Brand logo from Settings.
editor.siteChromeReadOnly: Only owners can edit site chrome.
editor.siteChromeSaveHint: Chrome changes are saved with the page.
editor.footerLayoutDescription: Choose the supported columns and content types for this site's footer.
editor.footerSelectedDescription: Edit the selected footer column or sub-block from the canvas.
editor.footerQuickMenuDescription: Adjust the footer layout here, or open the full inspector for content fields.
editor.emptyFooterColumn: No content in this column yet.
editor.noSectionsYet: No sections yet. Tap Add section below.
editor.addFirstBlockHint: Click the + above to add one.
editor.switchToCanvasToAddBlocks: Switch to canvas view to add blocks.
editor.deleteBlockDescription: {label} will be removed from this page. This cannot be undone.
editor.pickBlockType: Pick a block type to insert at this position.
editor.presetLoadFailed: Could not load saved presets: {message}. You can still pick a blank block.
editor.deletePresetDescription: This removes the preset from the picker. It will not affect blocks already inserted on pages.
editor.label: Label
editor.invalidCtaUrl: URL must be http(s), mailto:, tel:, #anchor, or /-relative

preview.magicLinkGenericSuccess: If this email has preview access, you will receive a magic link.
preview.previewAccessSendFailed: Preview access could not be sent.
preview.superAdminRequired: Only super-admins can manage customer preview access.
preview.checkoutRequiresPreviewAccess: Customer checkout requires Better Auth preview access.
preview.accessUnavailableDescription: Use the email address that received the preview invitation, or request a new magic link.
preview.loginDescription: Enter the email address from your preview invitation.
preview.themeSaveFailed: Style changes could not be saved.
preview.approvalRecorded: Approval recorded. Continue to checkout when you are ready.
preview.reviewTitle: What would you like to change?
preview.reviewDescription: Tell us what should be different or better for {site}.
preview.reviewNotesPlaceholder: Describe as clearly as possible what you want changed.
preview.reviewSaved: Your notes have been saved. We will use them for the next step.
preview.reviewSaveFailed: Your notes could not be saved.
preview.checkoutDescription: Review the order for {site}, choose your domain name, and complete your order securely.
preview.checkoutDomainStepDescription: Choose the domain name for your website.
preview.checkoutDetailsDescription: We use these details for the domain registration. Edit anything that is not correct.
preview.checkoutPaymentStepDescription: Review your domain, domain holder, and total.
preview.checkoutDomainAvailable: {domain} is available. You can continue to payment.
preview.checkoutDomainAvailableExtraFee: {domain} is available with a one-time {extraFee} domain surcharge. You will see one total before paying.
preview.checkoutDomainUnavailable: {domain} is not available. Choose another domain name.
preview.checkoutDomainPremium: {domain} is a premium domain and is not included in this fixed package. Choose another domain name.
preview.checkoutDomainCheckFailed: We could not check {domain} right now. Try again later.
preview.checkoutDomainInvalid: Enter a valid domain name, for example example.com.
preview.checkoutDomainServiceUnavailable: Domain checking is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
preview.checkoutDomainCheckingDescription: We are checking live whether this domain name is available.
preview.checkoutDomainInputUnavailable: This domain name is not available or cannot be used right now.
preview.checkoutRegistrantRequired: Enter the domain holder details completely.
preview.checkoutRegistrantDescription: We use these details to register the domain name to you or your organization.
preview.checkoutDetailsOverviewDescription: Review the overview first. Open edit only if the domain holder details need changes.
preview.checkoutDomainSubmitDescription: After payment we register this domain name and prepare your website for launch. You pay the first year upfront, then your website continues monthly through the same payment mandate.
preview.checkoutPaymentAlreadyComplete: Payment for this website is already complete.
preview.checkoutPaymentFailed: We could not start payment. Try again or contact us.
preview.checkoutPaymentDescription: This total includes VAT, the website, domain registration, and launch for the first year. After that you authorize monthly automatic renewal.
preview.checkoutPreviewApprovalLabel: I have reviewed the website and approve it for publication.
preview.checkoutPreviewApprovalHelp: Check the text, contact details, services, prices, claims, and forms.
preview.checkoutTermsAcceptanceLabel: I agree to the <terms>Site in a Box general terms</terms> (version {version}).
preview.checkoutPrivacyDisclosure: We process data as described in the <privacy>privacy and cookie statement</privacy>.
preview.checkoutDirectoryNotice: We may show public business information from your website in our portfolio or business directory. You can opt out via info@siteinabox.nl.
preview.checkoutPreviewApprovalRequired: Confirm that you reviewed the website and approve it for publication.
preview.checkoutTermsAcceptanceRequired: Accept the general terms before continuing to payment.

preferences.emptyDescription: Records appear after intake consent or a user saves email preferences.

notifications.description: Current operational email recipients per site and category.
notifications.emptyDescription: No site notification subscriptions match this selection.

events.title: Immutable preference history
events.description: Chronological opt-in, opt-out, subscription, locale, and suppression evidence.
events.emptyDescription: No immutable events are linked to this preference.

deliveryDetail.title: Legal delivery
deliveryDetail.retryQueuedDescription: The delivery is queued again. The worker will process the new attempt.
deliveryDetail.retryFailedDescription: The recovery action was not completed. Check the current status and retry if permitted.
deliveryDetail.retryDescription: This action is recorded immutably. Permanent provider rejections cannot be queued again.
deliveryDetail.retryReasonPlaceholder: Reason for the manual recovery action

agreements.title: Agreements and notices
agreements.description: Review legal changes and accept updated terms when required.
agreements.objectedDescription: Site in a Box will contact you about the next steps.
agreements.failedDescription: Try again. Contact Site in a Box if this keeps happening.
agreements.upToDateDescription: There are no outstanding legal actions.
agreements.initialTermsDescription: These terms apply to your use of Site in a Box. Review and accept them to continue using the service.
agreements.acceptanceConfirmation: I agree to the updated Site in a Box terms and conditions.

attention.title: Attention required
attention.description: Exceptions requiring follow-up, ordered by urgency.

requirements.title: Legal customer actions

acceptances.title: Acceptance evidence

list.title: Operations
list.subtitle: Preview delivery, checkout completion, live sites, and items requiring recovery.
list.noTasksDescription: Preview, checkout, live, and recovery items appear here.

workflowText.Intake automation failed and needs recov: Intake automation failed and needs recovery.
workflowText.The reviewed brief is ready for draft ge: The reviewed brief is ready for draft generation recovery.
workflowText.The request has no linked draft and need: The request has no linked draft and needs recovery.
Draft site is ready for client checkout.
workflowText.This intake record is outside the normal: This intake record is outside the normal Operations queue.

failed.title: Intake failed
failed.description: Review the error summary under Advanced before continuing. Secret-looking fields are redacted before display.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.summary: Technical details, raw summaries, and workflow history

recovery.title: Manual intake recovery
recovery.description: These controls are for failed or imported requests only. New public intake submissions generate drafts automatically.
recovery.approveDescription: Save reviewed input for legacy or failed requests.
recovery.draftLinked: A draft is already linked to this intake.
recovery.rerunDescription: Recovery only. Normal intake submissions start generation automatically.
recovery.reviewRequired: A reviewed brief is required for recovery.
recovery.deleteDescription: Only unused requests can be removed. Type DELETE to confirm.
recovery.deleteBlocked: Deletion is blocked because a draft site or customer site is already linked.

previewAccess.helper: Creates or refreshes preview access and emails the customer link.

previewLink.title: Customer preview link
previewLink.createFailedMessage: Preview link could not be created.
previewLink.copyFailedMessage: Copy failed. Select the link and copy it manually.

failure.title: Draft failed
failure.description: Review the Advanced section for diagnostics. Raw AI output is intentionally not shown in this control-plane view.

preview.title: Send preview
preview.help: Manual preview send is the normal operator gate.

disabled.notReady: Preview links are available after the draft is ready for review.
disabled.noTenant: Preview links require a linked site.
disabled.noPages: Preview links require at least one linked page.

recovery.title: Automation recovery
recovery.description: Failed post-payment automation can be retried here. Normal preview sending remains manual.
recovery.postPaymentHelp: Subscription, domain provisioning, sender refresh, and publish/activation recovery.
recovery.noStatus: No post-payment automation status has been recorded for this run yet.
recovery.paymentRequired: Payment must be completed or waived before automation recovery can run.
recovery.retrySubscriptionHelp: Creates the missing Mollie renewal subscription when payment is complete.
recovery.retryDomainHelp: Retries OpenProvider registration plus Cloudflare DNS and sender setup.
recovery.refreshProvisioningHelp: Refreshes site sender state and re-checks activation gates.
recovery.retryPublishHelp: Reuses an existing run snapshot or publishes and activates a new one.

checkout.title: Client checkout controls
checkout.description: Client approval plus Mollie completion or a manual waiver satisfies checkout. Checkout does not make the site live.

domain.title: Domain verification controls
domain.description: DNS remains manual. Confirm the customer domain and any aliases point at the renderer before marking verified.
domain.notesPlaceholder: Observed DNS target, proxy route, alias check, or failure reason
domain.linkTenant: Link a site before checking the domain.

promotion.title: Promote pages
promotion.description: Promotes only pages linked to this approved run. Promotion does not publish or activate a snapshot.
promotion.approvalRequired: Client approval is required before run pages can be promoted.

snapshots.title: Snapshot lifecycle
snapshots.description: Publishing freezes promoted CMS pages into an immutable snapshot. Activation is a separate live-renderer switch unless selected here.
snapshots.noneDescription: Publish this run after linked pages are promoted to create the first snapshot.
snapshots.noActiveDescription: The site has snapshots, but none is active for the renderer.
snapshots.reasonPlaceholder: Operator note for publish or activation
snapshots.manualOverride: Manual activation override for approval/payment only
